About Us

"Design is not just what it looks like and feels like. Design is how it works."

Our designs do not cost - they earn!

We’re the team who’ve delivered awesome projects and make a long lasting trustable relationship with our clients. We believe that the key to a successful brand is its ability to be adored. Every brand must find a magical connection with their consumer to dole out some love at every possible touch point.

Happy Customers

What We Do ?

Commerial Office

Break the stereotype of dull office spaces with exemplary design ideas for your brand with Greystone Infra. Let’s work together to create an atmosphere that incorporates your style and brand personality.

Cafe / Restaurant

Balance functionality and aesthetics to thoughtfully create a signature brand environment for cafes and restaurants. With our best cafe interior designing services across India, you’ll have the right prototype for your franchise

Hospitality

Create stunning and flexible spaces that cater communities diverse needs. Our designs are the cornerstone of an efficient theme, high-end furnishing, and luxurious oasis.

Retail

Blend innovation with practicality to create a retail space that gives your customers a smooth shopping experience. We have delivered creative retail concepts that have transformed reputable brands.

Factory

We turn visions into reality by building factory spaces that combine robust design, advanced engineering, and precision execution. From the ground up, we ensure every step—planning, waste management, climatology and adopt advance technology in construction—aligns with your business needs and operational goals. We incorporate state-of-the-art technology and sustainable solutions, ensuring the factory is energy-efficient, durable, and future-ready.

Our Our

Process Process

01

The Connection

Get in touch with us & let us know what you need

02

PROPOSAL

We’ll send you a proposal outlining your project scope, Layout Moodboard, Budget, Timeline

03

ON BOARDING

Finalization of layout. design moodboard & budget apporaval

04

DESIGN/MATERIAL FINALIZATION

Final design presentation with 3D visualization and materials samples approval

05

EXECUTION

After design finalization the actual work started shaping on the site with considering quality & timeline delivery

06

HANDOVER/POST SALE SERVICE

We Will provide post sale services after handling over the project*

Why Greystone ?

Multi-Services for

Commercial Interiors

Our team have vast experience into the design & execution of large projects. It requires creativity and imagination to generate ideas and concepts but translating this imagination into concrete reality is entirely a different ball game. In the realm of one stop fit-out & interior solution company, greystone is a company which makes it happen.

FAQ'S

Why should I choose you, and what services do you offer?

Greystone Infra is a platform which offers end to end solution from design to Build for commercial spaces like corporate office, retails, hospitality & Institutes.
We are a team of dedicated professionals delivering high-quality Interior designing services across India

What is the process of your work?

We start with a meeting, where you will meet with our qualified designers. We will understand your requirements and propose different solutions to meet them. After that, it will help you with the cost of designing your complete space. Once approved, we begin the production process. Throughout this stage, we will keep you updated on the progress. Finally, we will deliver and install everything in your space upon completion, ensuring everything meets your expectations.

How long does it take to finish a retail interior designing project?

Our interior designers promise long-lasting quality in their work. Each project’s completion time may vary depending on the nature of the work. It’s not fixed.

In what ways does Greystone Infra Interiors differentiate each space?

We personally design each area because we think that every space is special. Our team of experts pays attention to our client’s preferences and needs, ensuring that every project has a unique and personalised design.
